titleStmt.title: SII 41.289: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 289. (A.R. No. 505 of 1905.) Jambukēśvaram, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the east wall of the third prākarā in the Jambukēśvara temple, Tiruvānaikāval, Tiruvānaikāval.

summary.p: Stones damaged in several places. Appears to record a sale of land to the temple by an individual who had kāṇi rights in Ichaṇaikkuṟai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājarājarāja = [Picture] tevarkku tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pradhamaiyum cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷteṉkarai pāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār
nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevakaṉmi karairājarāja* vaḷanāṭṭup pācciṟkūṟṟattu kiḻpalāṟṟu Icaṉaikkuṟaikkāṇi Uṭaiya ṇa muṭaiyāṉ kaṉiyāḻvāṉ meṉāṭṭāṉ
vilaipramāṉa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Icaṉaikkuṟaittalaikkuṟaiyil nāṉ viṟkiṉṟa nilattukku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai Ūṟpotu nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ūṟpotu nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellainiroṭu kā
lukku vaṭakku mipāṟkellai Ūṟpotu nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaṭavāṟṟu niroṭu kālukku teṟkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉ kellaiyuḷnaṭuvuppaṭṭa
yum Iṟṟai nāḷāl viṟṟukkuṭutta ni Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 4 100 2 10 Ikkācu nāṉūṟṟirupattaiñcum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik
ṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivu tevarkaṉmikaḷukku pūvaṇamuṭaiyāṉ kaṉiyāḻvāṉ meṉāṭṭarayaṉeṉ Iṉṉilam nālumāk kāṇikkum ru
pat taiñcume vilaiyāvutā poruṭ celavolaiyāvutākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟuti poruṭcelavolai kāṭṭa kaṭavatalla I nilattu
meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum keṇikaḷum maṉaikaḷum maṉaippaṭaippaiyum potuvum potātiyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Akappaṭa mikutikkuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅka Iṉṉilam nālumāk
kāṇikkum Ivarkaḷ veṇumeṉṟa pote pramāmaṇam paṇṇik kuṭukkak kaṭaveṉākavum kuṭuttilenākil Inta pramāmāṇa Icaivutiṭṭe pramāṇamāvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟakko
ṇṭu vilaipramāṇa Icaivuttiṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkavuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukku pūvaṇamuṭaiyāṉ kaṉiyāḻvāṉ meṉāṭṭarayaṉeṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai pū
ṉ kaṉiyāḻvāṉ meṉāṭṭarayaṉ sayiñai Āṉamaikku Ivvūr Ūṟkaṇakku vaṭavuṭaiyāṉ kaṇa meṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ kūṟṟutaittāṉāṉa poṉṉampalakkūtta-ṉeḻuttu Ivai Aṟiveṉ Ivai pūvaṇa
pañceṉeti vāṇaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ maṉakkuṭaiyāṉeṉ Eḻuttu Aṟiveṉ nāṇaṟkuṟai Aracūr keḻutavaṉ tirucciṟṟampalanampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ ma ṭaiyāṉ
ṭaiyāṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ teṉkarai nāṭṭu viḻupparayaṉeṉ
Digital edition of SII 41.289 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
